title: Machine Registry
description: Maps machine slugs to their hardware and software environment metadata.

platform_notes.description: Human-readable description of the machine environment and any relevant constraints

python.description: Absolute path to the Python interpreter, or null if not available

node.description: Node.js version string (e.g. v22.19.0), or null if not available

shell.description: Shell description (e.g. bash via Git Bash), or null if not applicable
